infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Zoe needs access to your photo library so you can attach images and videos to posts and shorts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Zoe uses your camera when you capture a new photo or video for a post or short.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Zoe records audio when you capture a video short.

plugins.photosPermission: Zoe needs access to your photo library so you can attach images and videos to posts and shorts.
plugins.cameraPermission: Zoe uses your camera when you capture a new photo or video for a post or short.
plugins.microphonePermission: Zoe records audio when you capture a video short.
